meaning: n.三色旗,三基色,三原色adj.三色的
examples: On the day of the anniversary, the only sign of festivity was a small tricolor attached to the wing mirror of a garbage truck.
Finally the possibility of achieving tricolor by fiber laser is discussed.
Motorboats trailing the Dutch tricolor flag, or the Amsterdam city flag with its three Xs, careen by, their wakes gently rocking you.
There is a fast-growing pay-TV market, led by satellite broadcaster Tricolor.
